title: tephrosia vogelii
intro: Tephrosia vogelii, also known as Vogel's tephrosia or Vogel's snake root, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. Its health benefits include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, as well as aiding in the treatment of kidney stones and bladder problems. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia vogelii are typically made by boiling the roots or leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
